My significant other would never let me sit in silence at a dinner feeling guilty because the place I picked wasn’t up to par. He’d laugh and make a joke of it and comfort me and make sure I knew everything was okay. At the end of the day it’s just dinner and not that serious. No way he’d let me feel like I disappointed him. No way he’d let me sit through an entire dinner feeling shame over a restaurant pick. Whether he understood my feelings or not. I am such a people pleaser and over thinker so I totally get why she felt upset and pressure and people like us need someone who doesn’t make you feel bad for being who you are and okay with reassuring you in those moments. I’m so sorry that Rachael probably felt that kind of pressure to please him the entire relationship.

I’m hearing rumours that this isn’t an accurate representation of what astartes 2 will be. Apparently this is just a very brief flashback section and the majority will take place in current 40k with primaris marines in all the new bad looking armour and vehicles. I can totally believe that this is the case since GW hates first born. If it is the case I feel extremely mislead and manipulated. This is nostalgia baiting and key jangling at its worst if true. We want a true spiritual successor to astartes 1 and that simply can’t be achieved in primaris armour. They’re frankly far too safe and halo looking to fit into the grim dark aesthetic that the artist had in the first one.
